global.description: The ad features a vibrant orange background with key text and elements centrally positioned.
global.main_message: Promoting a streaming service with a free trial and a reward offer.

elements.label: Orange background
elements.description: A solid orange background fills the entire canvas, providing a vibrant and warm base.

elements.label: Circular shapes
elements.description: Two overlapping circular shapes in a lighter shade of orange, adding visual interest to the background.

elements.label: Square shape
elements.description: A large square shape in the center, slightly darker than the background, creating a focal point.

elements.label: Stream the hype
elements.description: Bold, white text that reads 'Stream the hype' positioned centrally within the square shape.

elements.label: Start free today
elements.description: Smaller white text below 'Stream the hype' that says 'Start free today', providing a call to action.

elements.label: Claim reward
elements.description: A prominent white button with the text 'Claim reward' at the bottom of the ad, inviting user interaction.
elements.text_content: Stream the hype Start free today

elements.label: Price tag
elements.description: A bold, white price tag reading '€9.99' positioned just above the CTA button, indicating the cost.

elements.label: BingeLayer logo
elements.description: The logo 'BingeLayer' in large, bold text at the top of the ad, establishing brand identity.

elements.label: UGC label
elements.description: A small label reading 'UGC' in the top left corner, suggesting user-generated content.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, interstitial, bright and modern, key elements include a logo, price, and call to action.
embedding_texts.layout_text: The logo is at the top, followed by the main message in the center, and the CTA at the bottom.
embedding_texts.ocr_text: Stream the hype, Start free today, €9.99, Claim reward, BingeLayer, UGC
